title: Mastichodendron bojerianum
taxonomy: Mastichodendron bojerianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Mastichodendron and is native to the island of Madagascar. The classification of Mastichodendron bojerianum is within the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, and order Magnoliales. As a member of the Annonaceae family, Mastichodendron bojerianum is closely related to other plants such as the custard apple and the sugar apple. Further research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic relationships within the genus Mastichodendron.
